label: FACIS SFTP — File Filter & Routing
info:
Defensive guard re-checking the extension/size constraints (already applied
in the Poller). Routes accepted files to the per-format parser tabs:
  .json -> sftp.parse.json
  .csv  -> sftp.parse.csv
  other -> sftp.parse.raw  (mirrors Python's `raw_content` fallback at
                            sftp_poller.py:100-101)
Rejected files emit `sftp.dlq` with error_type='filter'.

name: extension + size guard
